v1FetchUptimeDataRequest.description: Request to fetch uptime data for a specific account within a date range.

accountId.description: Required. The account ID to fetch uptime data for.

end.description: Optional. The end of the date range for uptime data.

start.description: Optional. The start of the date range for uptime data.

v1FetchUptimeDataRequest.title: FetchUptimeDataRequest

v1FetchUptimeDataResponse.description: Response containing uptime events and uptime percentages for the requested period.

currentUptime.description: Output only. The current uptime percentage for the requested period.

events.description: Output only. The list of uptime events within the requested date range.

previousUptime.description: Output only. The previous uptime percentage for comparison.

v1FetchUptimeDataResponse.title: FetchUptimeDataResponse

v1SiteHealths.description: Health and uptime status information for a WordPress site.

accountGroupName.description: Output only. The account group name associated with this site.

accountId.description: Output only. The account ID associated with this site.

activationStatus.description: Output only. The activation status of the site.

currentHealth.description: Output only. The current health status of the site.

partnerId.description: Output only. The partner ID that owns this site.

siteId.description: Output only. The unique identifier of the site.

statusCode.description: Output only. The HTTP status code from the latest health check.

uptime1day.description: Output only. The uptime percentage over the last 1 day.

uptime30days.description: Output only. The uptime percentage over the last 30 days.

uptime7days.description: Output only. The uptime percentage over the last 7 days.

v1SiteHealths.title: SiteHealths

v1UptimeEvent.description: A single uptime event data point with timestamp and value.

dateTime.description: Output only. The date and time of the uptime event.

value.description: Output only. The uptime value at this point in time.

v1UptimeEvent.title: UptimeEvent

v1UptimeSearchRequest.description: Request to search for WordPress site uptime data for a partner.

partnerId.description: Required. The partner ID to search uptime data for.

v1UptimeSearchRequest.title: UptimeSearchRequest

v1UptimeSearchResponse.description: Response containing uptime and health data for WordPress sites.

siteHealths.description: Output only. The list of site health records.

totalResults.description: Output only. The total number of results for this query across all pages.

v1UptimeSearchResponse.title: UptimeSearchResponse

scopes.business-app: Allows the application to manage all features of Business App

requestBody.description: Request to search for WordPress site uptime data for a partner.
Request to fetch uptime data for a specific account within a date range.
